allow: Bash(gh repo create claude-study --public --description "Spring Boot 2.7 + Java 8 项目模板" --source=. --remote=origin --push)
Bash(git add -A && git commit -m "Update database config: claude database with new password")
Bash(git remote set-url origin git@github.com:luo1993hao/claude-study.git && git push)
Bash(git remote set-url origin https://github.com/luo1993hao/claude-study.git && GIT_ASKPASS=echo git push)
Bash(git config --global --remove-regexp "url\\." "insteadOf" 2>/dev/null; git remote set-url origin https://github.com/luo1993hao/claude-study.git && git push)
Bash(git config --global credential.helper store && git config --global url."https://github.com/".insteadOf "ssh://")
